sentences.target: Le portier nous tient la porte.

translations.fr: Le portier nous tient la porte.
translations.en: The doorman holds the door for us.
translations.es: El portero nos sostiene la puerta.
translations.de: Der Portier hält uns die Tür auf.
translations.it: Il portiere ci tiene aperta la porta.
translations.ko: 도어맨이 우리를 위해 문을 잡아 줘요.
translations.pt: O porteiro segura a porta para nós.
translations.vi: Người gác cửa giữ cửa cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De portier houdt de deur voor ons open.
translations.hu: A portás tartja nekünk az ajtót.
translations.hi: दरबान हमारे लिए दरवाज़ा थामे हुए है.
translations.el: Ο πορτιέρης μας κρατάει την πόρτα.
translations.id: Petugas pintu menahan pintu untuk kami.
translations.sv: Portieren håller upp dörren åt oss.
translations.ja: ドアマンが私たちのためにドアを押さえてくれる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the subject noun.
Common noun; masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic personal pronoun, 1st person plural; indirect object/beneficiary before the verb.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun; feminine singular; direct object of the verb.

sentences.target: Je parle au portier chaque matin.

translations.fr: Je parle au portier chaque matin.
translations.en: I talk to the doorman every morning.
translations.es: Hablo con el portero cada mañana.
translations.de: Ich spreche jeden Morgen mit dem Portier.
translations.it: Parlo con il portiere ogni mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我每天早上都会和门童说话。
translations.yue: 我每日朝早都同門童傾偈。
translations.ru: Я разговариваю со швейцаром каждое утро.
translations.pt: Eu falo com o porteiro todas as manhãs.
translations.he: אני מדבר עם השוער בכל בוקר.
translations.vi: Mỗi sáng tôi nói chuyện với người gác cửa.
translations.nl: Ik praat elke ochtend met de portier.
translations.hi: मैं हर सुबह दरबान से बात करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μιλάω με τον πορτιέρη κάθε πρωί.
translations.nb: Jeg snakker med portieren hver morgen.
translations.id: Setiap pagi saya berbicara dengan petugas pintu.
translations.sv: Jag pratar med portieren varje morgon.
translations.ro: Vorbesc cu portarul în fiecare dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg taler med portieren hver morgen.
translations.ja: 毎朝ドアマンと話します。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; used with the preposition 'à' for addressee.
Preposition 'à' contracted with definite article 'le' ('to the'); introduces the indirect object NP.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'à'.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'matin'.
Common noun; temporal NP ('each morning') functioning as an adverbial modifier.

sentences.target: Tu demandes les clés au portier.

translations.fr: Tu demandes les clés au portier.
translations.en: You ask the doorman for the keys.
translations.es: Le pides las llaves al portero.
translations.de: Du bittest den Portier um die Schlüssel.
translations.pt: Você pede as chaves ao porteiro.
translations.vi: Bạn xin chìa khóa từ người gác cửa.
translations.nl: Je vraagt de sleutels aan de portier.
translations.hi: तुम दरबान से चाबियाँ माँगते हो.
translations.el: Ζητάς τα κλειδιά από τον πορτιέρη.
translations.id: Kamu meminta kunci kepada petugas pintu.
translations.ja: あなたはドアマンに鍵を頼む。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive ('ask for').
Definite article, plural; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun; plural; direct object of the verb.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' ('to the'); introduces the indirect object NP.
Common noun; complement of the preposition.

sentences.target: Le portier appelle une voiture pour nous.
sentences.reading: /lə pɔʁtje apɛl yn vwatyʁ puʁ nu/

translations.fr: Le portier appelle une voiture pour nous.
translations.ipa: /lə pɔʁtje apɛl yn vwatyʁ puʁ nu/
translations.en: The doorman calls a car for us.
translations.es: El portero nos llama un coche.
translations.de: Der Portier ruft uns ein Auto.
translations.pt: O porteiro chama um carro para nós.
translations.vi: Người gác cửa gọi xe cho chúng tôi.
translations.nl: De portier belt een auto voor ons.
translations.hu: A portás hív nekünk egy autót.
translations.hi: दरबान हमारे लिए गाड़ी बुलाता है.
translations.el: Ο πορτιέρης μας καλεί ένα αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Portieren ringer etter en bil for oss.
translations.id: Petugas pintu memanggil mobil untuk kami.
translations.sv: Portieren ringer efter en bil åt oss.
translations.da: Portieren ringer efter en bil til os.
translations.ja: ドアマンが私たちのために車を呼ぶ.
